title: ASR Tactical Trip Wire Perimeter Cotter Pin for Alarm Signal Device (Pin Only)
description:
The ASR Tactical safety pin is proudly made in the USA and is constructed of durable stainless steel that won’t rust so you can trust it for use in all weather conditions outdoors. The safety pin is meant to be used with most all types of 209 perimeter alarm devices. The perimeter alarm is a trip wire activated signaling device that can alert you when trespassers are on your property. This extra safety pin will come in handy if you need a replacement for your current set up. These safety pins are designed to be compatible with the ASR Tactical trip wire perimeter alarm signaling device and will work for other brands as well.

ASR Tactical Trip Wire Perimeter Cotter Pin for Alarm Signal Device (Pin Only)

The ASR Tactical safety pin is proudly made in the USA and is constructed of durable stainless steel that won’t rust so you can trust it for use in all weather conditions outdoors. The safety pin is meant to be used with most all types of 209 perimeter alarm devices.

Key Features

  • SAFETY PIN FOR 209 PERIMETER ALARM - Replacement pack of safety pins for use with ASR Tactical perimeter alarm trip wire devices and most other brands of 209 perimeter alarms
  • MADE IN THE USA – The perimeter alarm safety pin is proudly made in the United States and is constructed of durable stainless steel that won’t rust so you can trust it for use in all types of weather
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Material: stainless steel; Safety pin diameter: 5/32"; Length: 1.25 inches; Available in assorted pack sizes
  • Always a good idea to have a few extra safety pins available

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRCOTPIN10
  • UPC: 810058480347
  • Color: Silver
